description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise upholstered in black faux leather with a boxy, geometric silhouette. The seat and backrest feature a tufted design with evenly spaced buttons, giving it a sophisticated, urban look. Both armrests are wide and straight, matching the height of the backrest and providing a sense of enclosure and comfort. The chaise stands on four slender, cylindrical legs, which are slightly set in from the corners and finished in a dark color. The seat cushions are thick and plush, divided into two sections, and the backrest is similarly split, each with its own tufted pattern. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for placement in urban parks, lobbies, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern black faux leather two-seater chaise with tufted seat and backrest, straight armrests, and slender cylindrical legs. The design is sleek, boxy, and urban.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight armrest, thick seat cushion, and the depth of the chaise.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat, segmented backrest and the four cylindrical legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other armrest and seat depth.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the tufted seat and backrest, divided into two sections, and both armrests.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and divided into two segments, each featuring a tufted pattern with buttons for a classic, tailored look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides have straight, boxy armrests that match the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, cylindrical, and appear to be made of metal with a dark finish, providing a minimalist and modern touch.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black faux leather with a tufted pattern on both the seat and backrest, featuring evenly spaced buttons.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, attached seat cushions and two matching backrest sections, each with its own tufted design, arranged side by side for a symmetrical appearance.
